metadata.title: CreatiAds - AI-Powered Ad Creative & Campaign Automation
metadata.description: Generate stunning ad creatives with AI, launch campaigns across Meta, Google & TikTok, and optimize performance automatically.

features.title: Everything You Need to Scale Your Ads
features.description: From creative generation to campaign optimization, CreatiAds provides a complete AI-powered advertising platform.

workflow.title: The AI Ad Closed Loop
workflow.description: From creative to campaign to optimization — one seamless AI workflow.
workflow.alt: AI Creative → Ad Publishing → Ad Optimization closed-loop workflow

creative.title: AI Creative
creative.description: Generate stunning ad images & videos with AI in seconds.

publishing.title: AI Ads Publishing

featureDeepDive.title: The Complete AI Ad Closed Loop
featureDeepDive.subtitle: From creative generation to campaign launch to continuous optimization — one intelligent platform powers it all.

aiCreative.title: AI Creative Generation
aiCreative.description: Generate scroll-stopping ad creatives in seconds. Our AI understands your brand, audience, and goals to produce high-converting images and videos across every format.
bullets: Generate 50+ ad variations in one click
aiCreative.imgAlt: AI Creative generation dashboard showing multiple ad formats

adLaunch.title: One Click Ad Launch
adLaunch.description: Publish campaigns across Meta, Google & TikTok with a single click. No more switching between ad managers — CreatiAds handles targeting, budgets, and placements automatically.
adLaunch.imgAlt: One-click ad launch dashboard with platform selection

adOptimization.title: AI Ad Optimization
adOptimization.description: Our AI monitors performance 24/7 and automatically adjusts bids, budgets, and creatives to maximize your ROAS — so you can focus on strategy, not spreadsheets.
adOptimization.imgAlt: AI optimization dashboard with real-time performance charts

showcase.description: See real examples of AI-generated ads across different verticals.

comparison.description: See how we stack up against traditional ad platforms in features and AI-powered performance.

useCases.description: See how teams across industries use CreatiAds to grow.

faq.description: Everything you need to know about CreatiAds.

items.question: What is CreatiAds?
items.answer: CreatiAds is an AI-powered platform that helps you generate high-converting ad creatives, launch campaigns across multiple platforms, and optimize performance automatically.

items.question: How does the AI Image Generator work?
items.answer: Simply describe your product or provide a URL, and our AI generates professional ad images optimized for your target platform in seconds.

items.question: Which ad platforms are supported?
items.answer: CreatiAds supports Meta (Facebook & Instagram), Google Ads, and TikTok Ads with full automation capabilities.

items.question: Is there a free plan?
items.answer: Yes! We offer a generous free plan with 50 credits per month, plus free tools like ROAS calculators, ad headline generators, and more.

items.question: How does CreatiAds compare to competitors?
items.answer: Unlike other tools that focus only on creative generation, CreatiAds combines AI creative generation with ad automation and optimization — all in one platform.

metadata.title: Pricing - CreatiAds
